summary: Completed backend API testing for Proof of Intelligence flow. Frontend testing encountered loading issues preventing full UI flow validation. Backend APIs are functional with minor validation response code difference.

minor_issues.issue: Invalid wallet validation returns 422 instead of expected 400
minor_issues.impact: Minor - 422 is actually more correct for Pydantic validation errors

critical_issues.issue: Frontend appears to have loading issues in automated browser - page gets stuck in loading state with terminal windows
critical_issues.details: Page shows loading terminals and doesn't complete loading process, preventing access to main UI

untested_flows.issue: Could not test full riddles flow due to page loading issues
affected_features: Error handling for wallet already linked/invalid

passed_tests: Riddle submission with correct answer (Level 3 clearance granted)
Riddle submission with wrong answer (properly rejected)
Already linked wallet rejection (1-to-1 rule working as expected)

success_percentage.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - 1 minor validation code difference)
success_percentage.frontend: 0% (unable to test due to loading issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Investigate frontend loading issues preventing UI access. Page gets stuck in loading state with terminal windows, preventing testing of the complete Proof of Intelligence flow. Backend APIs are functional and ready. Frontend may have JavaScript loading, timing, or build issues that need resolution before UI testing can proceed.
